{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220241368EC9E3BD6CBB2069CF25"}"},"total":546},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384427085411926846","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，希望作者大大加油，希望写墨雨云间，因为里面的人物都是迫不得已，薛芳菲，姜梨，婉宁，季淑然，琼枝……，让他们知道未来发生的一切事情，可以吗？真的超级期待[顶帖][求爆更]（当然里面的沈玉容最好没有cp，自生自灭）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719322649,"group_id":"7326343511660317758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无存稿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8TNrE9uQo7SXkm9bZnLsvavpW61AsjvpTqKPMNyFjSA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a87da67c5678418bba970397bef31b29~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708182&x-signature=OTEqWZeVulRbG%2BtvVMaHuHV0vAs%3D","user_id":"1834423848806172","user_name":"羡璃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1834423848806172","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7326343511660317758","book_info":{"abstract":"【综影视+观影体+弥补意难平】
【女主前期不知道系统的存在。】
夏怜浅在暑假的时候为了赚生活费做了影视吐槽博主，
可是她没想到，一个暑假，自己的名字就在所有的影视世界传遍了。
于是……
“什么！李莲花就是李相夷！”
“这宋焰跟大神真是一个天上一个地下。”
“阿云居然是无锋之人。”
“长珩仙君在凡间怎会如此失智。”
以至于后来夏怜浅开了直播……
“怜浅姑娘，我想问问你对王宝钏的评价。”
“恋爱脑，和许沁有的一拼。”
“怜浅姑娘，你知道巽芳在哪吗？”
“欧阳长恭旁边。”
“今天时间不早了，先下播了。”
“等会儿我们还有问题要问！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7781f0377ffd5e753b505dee23ebd81","author":"夜荼荼","author_id":"","book_id":"7326343511660317758","book_name":"影视诸天直播间，开局莲花楼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6320人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7326343708851307070","read_count":"6320","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"577141"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"281","tags":"女频衍生,系统,直播,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b031911c1aeb93f02941567af340b1ed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302496&x-signature=nIyk%2F04FlMSV6Ika07N2o132zBo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1020804977144174","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220241368EC9E3BD6CBB2069CF25"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
